title: 112 new Supreme Court AoRs cleared to vote in SCAORA elections
description: The Supreme Court on Monday permitted 112 newly qualified Advocates-on-Record (AoRs) to cast their votes in the upcoming Supreme Court Advocates-on-Record Association (SCAORA) elections. The bench of Chief Justice of India Surya Kant and Justice Joymalya Bagchi also granted the remaining applicants time till 5 PM on May 19 (Tuesday) to submit their eligibility forms.The order was passed on a petition filed by advocate Ritu Rajkumari against the SCAORA Election Committee.CJI Surya Kant and Justic
